name: scholaros
description: System-level Codex plugin for issue-driven academic Git workflows with local hooks, skills, lint, and HPC CI scaffolding guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Issue-driven academic Git workflow for AI-assisted research process governance
interface.longDescription: System-level Codex plugin for academic research repositories. Skills guide issue, commit, lint, PR, and merge workflows; global Codex hooks activate the packaged definitions under hooks/codex/hooks.json. Stop hooks protect opted-in repositories with Auto-Commit and Auto-Pull-Request routing; project scaffolds can install GitHub Actions and SJTU HPC self-hosted CI gates.
defaultPrompt: Use ScholarOS for issue-driven research work.
Use codex-gh-issue-start for new GitHub issues.
Run ScholarOS lint, then prepare a ScholarOS PR.
